---
title: "Alex's Defender Metric Approach"
author: "Alex Lewis"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(lme4)
library(patchwork)

soccer_data <- read_csv("project_data/combined_seasons.csv")
soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` <- soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` / 
  soccer_data$`Matches Played`
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(`Total Mins` = `Matches Played` * `Avg Mins per Match`) %>%
  rename(
    `Passes into Final Third`      = `1/3`,
    `Goals per 90`                 = `Goals p 90`,
    `Assists per 90`               = `Assists p 90`,
    `Shots per 90`                 = `Shots p 90`,
    `Expected Goals (xG)`          = `Expected Goals`,
    `Non-Penalty xG`               = `Exp NPG`,
    `Shot Creating Actions per 90` = `Shot creating actions p 90`,
    `Goal Creating Actions per 90` = `Goal creating actions p 90`,
    `Goals per Shot`               = `Goals per shot`,
    `Goals per Shot on Target`     = `Goals per shot on target`,
    `Tackles Attempted`            = `Tackles attempted`,
    `Shots Blocked`                = `Shots blocked`,
    `Passes Blocked`               = `Passes blocked`,
    `Dribble Tackle Success %`     = `% Dribbles tackled`,
    `Pass Completion %`            = `Pass completion %`,
    `Key Passes`                   = `Key passes`,
    `Progressive Pass Distance`    = `Progressive passes distance`,
    `Passes into Penalty Area`     = `Passes into penalty area`,
    `Take-Ons Attempted`           = `Take ons attempted`,
    `Successful Take-On %`         = `% Successful take-ons`,
    `Carries into Final Third`     = `carries final 3rd`,
    `Carries into Penalty Area`    = `carries penalty area`,
    `Possessions Lost`             = `Possessions lost`,
    `Aerial Duel Win %`            = `% Aerial Duels won`
  )
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(comp = str_trim(comp),
         comp = recode(comp,
           "eng Premier League" = "Premier League",
           "de Bundesliga"      = "Bundesliga",
           "es La Liga"         = "La Liga",
           "fr Ligue 1"         = "Ligue 1",
           "it Serie A"         = "Serie A"
         )) %>%
  relocate(season, .after = player)
head(soccer_data)
soccer_data <- na.omit(soccer_data)
```

```{r}
outfielders <- soccer_data %>% filter(!str_detect(pos, "GK"))
outfielders <- outfielders %>% filter(`Total Mins` >= 900)
defenders <- outfielders %>%
  filter(str_detect(pos, "DF")) %>%
  rename(
    `Touches in Defensive Penalty Area` = touches_def_pen,
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Interceptions per 90` = Interceptions / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = `Progressive Pass Distance` / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Passes Blocked per 90` =
      `Passes Blocked` / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Key Passes per 90` = `Key Passes` / `Total Mins` * 90
  ) %>%
  select(
    -`Crosses Stopped`,
    -`Non-Penalty xG`,
    -carries_prgc,
    -`Goals Against`,
    -`Goals against p 90`,
    -`Saves`,
    -`Saves %`,
    -`Clean Sheets`,
    -`% Clean sheets`,
    -`% Penalty saves`
  )
```

```{r}
# my attempt at making a heatmap across all leagues for all stats that have an interpretable effect
attacking_stats  <- c("Goals per 90", "Assists per 90", "Shots per 90",
                      "Expected Goals (xG)", "Shot Creating Actions per 90",
                      "Goal Creating Actions per 90", "Goals per Shot")
defensive_stats  <- c("Tackles Attempted", "Tackles Won", "Interceptions",
                      "Clearances", "Shots Blocked", "Passes Blocked",
                      "Dribble Tackle Success %")
passing_stats    <- c("Pass Completion %", "Key Passes",
                      "Progressive Pass Distance", "Passes into Final Third",
                      "Passes into Penalty Area", "Progressive Passes")
possession_stats <- c("Take-Ons Attempted", "Successful Take-On %",
                      "Progressive Carries", "Carries into Final Third",
                      "Carries into Penalty Area", "Possessions Lost",
                      "Aerial Duel Win %")
all_focal_stats  <- c(attacking_stats, defensive_stats, passing_stats, possession_stats)

eta_sq <- map_dfr(all_focal_stats, function(stat) {
  league_stat_data <- outfielders %>%
    select(comp, value = all_of(stat)) %>%
    drop_na()
  
  grand_mean <- mean(league_stat_data$value)
  ss_total <- sum((league_stat_data$value - grand_mean)^2)
  
  ss_between_leagues <- league_stat_data %>%
    group_by(comp) %>%
    summarise(n_players = n(), league_mean = mean(value)) %>%
    summarise(ss_between = sum(n_players * (league_mean - grand_mean)^2)) %>%
    pull(ss_between)
  
  tibble(
    stat   = stat,
    eta_sq = ss_between_leagues / ss_total,
    f_stat = summary(aov(value ~ comp, data = league_stat_data))[[1]]$`F value`[1]
  )
})

eta_sq <- eta_sq %>% arrange(desc(eta_sq))

league_stat_means <- outfielders %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(all_focal_stats), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  pivot_longer(-comp, names_to = "stat", values_to = "league_mean") %>%
  group_by(stat) %>%
  mutate(z_score = (league_mean - mean(league_mean)) / sd(league_mean)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(league_stat_means, aes(x = comp, y = reorder(stat, z_score), fill = z_score)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(z_score, 2)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue",
                       midpoint = 0, name = "Z-score") +
  labs(title    = "Heatmap of Player Stats By League",
       subtitle = "Z-score of league mean vs. cross-league mean",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```


```{r}
length(unique(defenders$player))
```

```{r}
nrow(defenders)
```

```{r}
defenders %>%
 group_by(comp) %>%
 summarise(
   mean_int = mean(`Interceptions per 90`),
   mean_tackle = mean(`Dribble Tackle Success %`),
   mean_aerial = mean(`Aerial Duel Win %`),
   mean_key = mean(`Key Passes per 90`),
   mean_completion = mean(`Pass Completion %`),
   mean_prog = mean(`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`)
 )
```

```{r}
m_int <- lmer(
  `Interceptions per 90` ~
    age +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_key <- lmer(
  `Key Passes per 90` ~
    age +
    `Interceptions per 90` +
    `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    comp * `Pass Completion %` +
    comp * `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_aerial <- lmer(
  `Aerial Duel Win %` ~
    age +
    comp * `Interceptions per 90` +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_prog <- lmer(
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` ~
    age +
    `Interceptions per 90` +
    `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    comp * `Pass Completion %` +
    comp * `Key Passes per 90` +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_pass <- lmer(
  `Pass Completion %` ~
  age +
  `Interceptions per 90` +
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
  `Aerial Duel Win %` +
  comp * `Key Passes per 90` +
  comp * `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
  (1|player)+(1|squad),
  data=defenders
)

m_drib <- lmer(
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` ~
  age +
  comp * `Interceptions per 90` +
  comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
  `Key Passes per 90` +
  `Pass Completion %` +
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
  (1|player)+(1|squad),
  data=defenders
)

ball_winning <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Interceptions per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Interceptions per 90`,.75),
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` = quantile(defenders$`Dribble Tackle Success %`,.75),
  `Aerial Duel Win %` = quantile(defenders$`Aerial Duel Win %`,.75),
  `Pass Completion %` = quantile(defenders$`Pass Completion %`,.25),
  `Key Passes per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Key Passes per 90`,.25),
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`,.25),
  comp=unique(defenders$comp)
)

ball_playing <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Interceptions per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Interceptions per 90`,.25),
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` = quantile(defenders$`Dribble Tackle Success %`,.25),
  `Aerial Duel Win %` = quantile(defenders$`Aerial Duel Win %`,.25),
  `Pass Completion %` = quantile(defenders$`Pass Completion %`,.75),
  `Key Passes per 90`= quantile(defenders$`Key Passes per 90`,.75),
  `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = quantile(defenders$`Progressive Pass Distance per 90`,.75),
  comp=unique(defenders$comp)
)

predict_archetype <- function(df,label) {
 df %>%
   mutate(
     int_pred = predict(m_int,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     key_pred = predict(m_key,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     aerial_pred = predict(m_aerial,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     prog_pred = predict(m_prog,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     drib_pred = predict(m_drib,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     pass_pred = predict(m_pass,newdata=.,re.form=NA),
     archetype = label
   ) %>%
   select(
     archetype,
     comp,
     int_pred,
     drib_pred,
     aerial_pred,
     pass_pred,
     key_pred,
     prog_pred
   ) %>%
   pivot_longer(
     cols=-c(archetype,comp),
     names_to="metric",
     values_to="prediction"
   )
}

preds <- bind_rows(
  predict_archetype(ball_winning, "Ball-Winning"),
  predict_archetype(ball_playing, "Ball-Playing")
)

preds <- preds %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  mutate(z = as.numeric(scale(prediction))) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(preds, aes(metric,comp,fill=z)) +
  geom_tile(color="white") +
  geom_text(aes(label=round(z,2)), color="black") +
  facet_wrap(~archetype) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low="firebrick3", mid="white", high="goldenrod2", midpoint=0) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      int_pred = "Interceptions",
      drib_pred = "Tackle\nSuccess %",
      aerial_pred = "Aerial\nWin %",
      pass_pred = "Pass\nCompletion %",
      key_pred = "Key Passes",
      prog_pred = "Passing\nDistance"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mixed-Model Predicted League Suitability by Defender Archetype",
    x = "Performance Dimension",
    y = "League",
    fill = "Relative\nSuitability\n(within metric)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 9
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    panel.spacing = unit(2,"lines")
  )
```

```{r}
heatmap_table <- preds %>%
  mutate(
    metric = recode(
      metric,
      int_pred = "Interceptions",
      drib_pred = "Tackle Success %",
      aerial_pred = "Aerial Win %",
      pass_pred = "Pass Completion %",
      key_pred = "Key Passes",
      prog_pred = "Passing Distance"
    ),
    score = round(z, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    archetype,
    league = comp,
    metric,
    score
  ) %>%
  arrange(archetype, metric, league)

heatmap_table

write_csv(
  heatmap_table,
  "heatmap_league_suitability_scores.csv"
)
```

```{r}
player_re <- ranef(m_int)$player %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(effect = `(Intercept)`)

squad_re <- ranef(m_int)$squad %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(effect = `(Intercept)`)

p_player <- ggplot(player_re, aes(x = effect)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = function(x) seq(0, ceiling(max(x)), by = 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "Player Random Effects",
    x = "Random Intercept",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_squad <- ggplot(squad_re, aes(x = effect)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = function(x) seq(0, ceiling(max(x)), by = 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Squad Random Effects",
    x = "Random Intercept",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

full_plot <- p_player + p_squad +
  plot_annotation(title = "Distribution of Random Effects from Interceptions Model")

ggsave(
  filename = "random_effects.png",
  plot = full_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
newdata_all <- bind_rows(
  ball_winning %>% mutate(archetype = "Ball-Winning"),
  ball_playing %>% mutate(archetype = "Ball-Playing")
)

make_boot_table <- function(model, newdata, metric_name, nsim = 500) {
  pred_fun <- function(fit) {
    predict(fit, newdata = newdata, re.form = NA)
  }
  boot_out <- bootMer(
    model,
    FUN = pred_fun,
    nsim = nsim,
    type = "parametric",
    use.u = FALSE
  )
  boot_df <- as.data.frame(boot_out$t)
  
  colnames(boot_df) <- paste(newdata$archetype, newdata$comp, sep = "___")
  
  boot_df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = everything(),
      names_to = "cell",
      values_to = "prediction"
    ) %>%
    separate(
      cell,
      into = c("archetype", "comp"),
      sep = "___"
    ) %>%
    group_by(archetype, comp) %>%
    summarise(
      estimate = mean(prediction),
      lower_95 = quantile(prediction, 0.025),
      upper_95 = quantile(prediction, 0.975),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(metric = metric_name) %>%
    select(archetype, comp, metric, estimate, lower_95, upper_95)
}

set.seed(460)

ci_int <- make_boot_table(m_int, newdata_all, "Interceptions per 90", nsim = 500)
ci_key <- make_boot_table(m_key, newdata_all, "Key Passes per 90", nsim = 500)
ci_aerial <- make_boot_table(m_aerial, newdata_all, "Aerial Duel Win %", nsim = 500)
ci_prog <- make_boot_table(m_prog, newdata_all, "Progressive Pass Distance per 90", nsim = 500)
ci_drib <- make_boot_table(m_drib, newdata_all, "Tackle Success %", nsim = 500)
ci_pass <- make_boot_table(m_pass, newdata_all, "Pass Completion %", nsim = 500)

uncertainty_table <- bind_rows(
  ci_int,
  ci_drib,
  ci_aerial,
  ci_pass,
  ci_key,
  ci_prog
) %>%
  arrange(archetype, metric, comp) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    lower_95 = round(lower_95, 3),
    upper_95 = round(upper_95, 3),
    ci = paste0(estimate, " (", lower_95, ", ", upper_95, ")")
  )
uncertainty_table %>%
  select(archetype, comp, metric, ci)

cat(
  knitr::kable(
    uncertainty_table %>%
      select(
        Archetype = archetype,
        League = comp,
        Metric = metric,
        `Estimate (95% CI)` = ci
      ),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption = "Uncertainty table of estimated defender metrics per archetype per league"
  )
)
```

```{r}
m_age_quad <- update(
  m_int,
  . ~ . + I(age^2)
)

age_test <- anova(m_int, m_age_quad)

library(knitr)

library(knitr)

lrt_table <- data.frame(
  Comparison = "Linear vs Quadratic Age",
  ChiSq = age_test$Chisq[2],
  df = age_test$Df[2],
  p_value = age_test$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2]
)

cat(
  kable(
    lrt_table,
    format="latex",
    booktabs=TRUE
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
m_fixed_only <- lm(
  `Interceptions per 90` ~
    age +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90`,
  data = defenders,
  REML = FALSE
)

m_player_only <- lmer(
  `Interceptions per 90` ~
    age +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|player),
  data = defenders,
  REML = FALSE
)

m_squad_only <- lmer(
  `Interceptions per 90` ~
    age +
    comp * `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
    comp * `Aerial Duel Win %` +
    `Key Passes per 90` +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    (1|squad),
  data = defenders,
  REML = FALSE
)

m_player_squad <- update(m_int, REML = FALSE)

AIC(m_fixed_only, m_player_only, m_squad_only, m_player_squad)

random_effects_aic <- AIC(
  m_fixed_only,
  m_player_only,
  m_squad_only,
  m_player_squad
) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Model") %>%
  mutate(
    Model = recode(
      Model,
      m_fixed_only = "Fixed Effects Only",
      m_player_only = "Player Random Effect",
      m_squad_only = "Squad Random Effect",
      m_player_squad = "Player + Squad Random Effects"
    ),
    Delta_AIC = AIC - min(AIC)
  ) %>%
  arrange(AIC)

cat(
  knitr::kable(
    random_effects_aic,
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    digits = 3
  )
)
```
